windows.transcript: a simple way to make your own candles. Step 1. Melt candle wax in a double boiler.
windows.embed_text_v2: Melting candle wax in a clear glass measuring jug with a wooden slotted spatula stirring, white wax chunks dissolving into golden liquid, tutorial opens with finished pink/white/lavender bubble candles and a Step 1 title card.
windows.summary_v2: Tutorial opens with finished bubble candles then a 'Step 1' title card before showing wax being melted and stirred with a wooden spatula in a glass measuring jug.

tags_v2.container: jug (melting pot, not final candle container)

seconds_v2.desc: Top-down hero shot of finished bubble candles: a small pink bubble candle, a white bubble candle and a lavender bubble candle on a cream silk cloth; pink graphic frame border around the vertical video.
Similar overhead view of three bubble candles on satin cloth (white, lit lavender, pink off-frame); same pink overlay border.
Cut to a plain pink title card with large white text 'Step 1' centered on screen.
Top-down view of a clear glass measuring jug holding chunks of solid white candle wax floating in melted wax, a wooden slotted spatula stirs inside.
Continued melt: more wax has liquefied around the remaining solid chunks; hand-held wooden spatula keeps stirring inside the measuring jug.
Wooden spatula pushes the half-melted wax chunks through the pale yellow liquid wax inside the heat-resistant measuring jug.
Wax has fully melted to a clear golden-yellow liquid; wooden slotted spatula continues a slow stir in the measuring jug.
Closer/blurry overhead of the same melted wax pool; the wooden spatula sits in the warm yellow liquid.
Back to focus: wooden slotted spatula rests in the now-clear melted wax inside the glass measuring jug; double-boiler step complete.

windows.transcript: types you can make. This is how you can make candles of different styles and designs at home.
windows.embed_text_v2: pouring amber wax from glass measuring jug into rose-shaped silicone moulds, packing pale wax into carved rose petals with tool, candle moulding, vertical clip
windows.summary_v2: Filling rose-shaped silicone moulds with wax, packing a pale base layer then pouring amber wax over it.

tags_v2.action: filling rose silicone moulds with wax

seconds_v2.desc: Vertical phone clip (pink side bars): top-down view into a container of glossy tan/olive wax with a swirl, a tool dipping at the surface.
Extreme close-up of a rose-shaped silicone mould cavity; a white stick tool packs/smooths soft pale wax into the carved rose petals.
Tool continues working pale wax into the spiral rose petals of the white silicone mould.
Close-up of the rose mould cavity nearly filled with smooth pale wax, tool blending the center.
Camera pulls back: several round white rose-shaped silicone moulds on a white surface; a clear glass measuring jug begins pouring amber wax into one mould.
Amber wax streams from the glass jug into a rose mould; other filled rose moulds sit alongside.
Pouring continues, amber wax filling the carved rose cavity over the pale base layer.
Jug tips further, topping the rose mould with translucent amber wax.
Amber wax pour finishing into the rose silicone mould, multiple rose moulds visible on the white surface.
